title: PWA quick-capture screen polish
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want the capture screen to feel like a notes app so that I never lose a thought to a refresh or a slow toast.
acceptanceCriteria: Optional tags input (chips) lets the user hint entity types (e.g. 'met:Alice company:Acme'); tags are passed to /api/capture in the request body
Submit calls /api/capture (now async per US-005); toast appears in <100ms
Auto-save draft to localStorage on every keystroke; restore on reload so a refresh does not lose the in-progress thought
PWA manifest 'shortcuts' array adds 'Quick Capture' so iOS long-press on the home-screen icon opens /capture directly
Verify: open /capture from the home-screen long-press; type a note; refresh mid-typing; the draft is restored; submit; toast in <100ms
